description: Input schema for ElevenLabs Sound Effects.

text.description: Description of the sound effect to generate (e.g., 'Cinematic Braam, Horror').
text.title: Text

duration_seconds.description: Duration in seconds (0.5-22). Leave empty for automatic duration.
duration_seconds.title: Duration Seconds

prompt_influence.description: How much the prompt influences generation (0-1). Higher = more literal interpretation.
prompt_influence.title: Prompt Influence

title: AppInput
